title: taraxacum trigonum
intro: Taraxacum trigonum, also known as the upright dandelion or prickly dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum trigonum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve skin issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in salves and topical creams for its medicinal properties.
